commands.review_summary:
The PR teaches gateway node identity paths to use custom node IDs from `client.instanceId`, adds `ownerDeviceId`-backed pairing adoption, and expands gateway/node tests around registry, catalog, pending work, events, invoke results, and node-host behavior.

PR surface: Source +143, Tests +732. Total +875 across 19 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main sends `--node-id` as `client.instanceId` but central gateway paths still resolve the node from device/client ids; I did not run a live repro in this read-only review.
